info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Target API
Activities
Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Activities

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of activities to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of activities to skip for pagination.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of all Target activities (A/B tests, experience targeting, multivariate tests, and automated personalization) in the tenant. Each entry includes the activity ID, name, type, state, and modification date.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Activity

items.docs: Creates a new Target activity of the specified type (AB, XT, MVT, or Automated Personalization). The request body must include the activity name, type, and at least one experience with associated offers.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Activity

items.docs: Retrieves the full configuration and metadata of a single Target activity by its activity ID, including experiences, audiences, metrics, and scheduling.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Activity

items.docs: Updates an existing Target activity with new configuration. The full activity object must be provided in the request body.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Activity

items.docs: Permanently deletes a Target activity. Active activities should be deactivated before deletion.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update Activity State

items.docs: Activates, deactivates, or archives a Target activity by updating its state. Valid state transitions depend on the current state.

info.name: Audiences
Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Audiences

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of all audiences configured in Adobe Target. Each audience includes its ID, name, description, and targeting rules.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Audience

items.docs: Creates a new audience in Adobe Target with the specified name and targeting rules.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Audience

items.docs: Retrieves the full definition of a single audience by its audience ID, including all targeting rules and conditions.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Audience

items.docs: Updates an existing audience with new targeting rules or metadata.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Audience

items.docs: Permanently deletes an audience. Audiences in use by active activities cannot be deleted.

info.name: Offers
Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Offers

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of content offers configured in Adobe Target. Offers include HTML, JSON, and redirect offer types.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Offer

items.docs: Creates a new content offer in Adobe Target. The offer can be HTML content, a JSON payload, or a redirect URL.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Get an Offer

items.docs: Retrieves a single offer by its offer ID, including the content payload and metadata.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Update an Offer

items.docs: Updates an existing offer with new content or metadata.

info.name: Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Delete an Offer

items.docs: Permanently deletes an offer. Offers in use by active activities cannot be deleted.

info.name: Properties
Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Properties

items.docs: Returns a list of enterprise properties configured for the Adobe Target tenant. Properties are used with enterprise permissions to control access to activities and offers.

info.name: Environments
Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud List Environments

items.docs: Returns a list of environments (development, staging, production) configured for the Adobe Target tenant.

info.name: Delivery
Adobe Target Adobe Experience Cloud Deliver Personalized Experiences

items.docs: The Target Delivery API endpoint for fetching personalized content for one or more mboxes. Used by client-side and server-side implementations to retrieve offers, execute page load decisions, and prefetch content for subsequent views.
